narrative:
Lafayette Twp township has 2,539 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.6 percentage points.
